/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 03-03-08 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEATO COUNT 1,A VIOLATION OF PC SECTION 212,5(C) AND TO COUNT 5, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION OF 186,22A ENTEREDON 03-03-08 IS VACATED AND NEW PLEASOF NOT GUILTY ARE ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE ANAMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 8, A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION243(D) AND COUNT 9, A MISDEMEANOR VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 186,22AIS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANG: 8/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:9/NOLO/NUNCDAT: 03-03-08/TWS/X: PSR ISWAIVED,/CTORD: IMPOSITION OF SENTENCE SUSPENDED/X: THE PROBATION ORDEREDSHALL BE SERVED AS FORMAL PROBATION,/CTORD: PROBATION IS GRANTED FOR A PERIOD OF 364 DAYS, SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS:/X: AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, THE DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTYJAIL OF 364DAYS, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 364 DAYS,/CTORD: COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IS DEEMED COMPLETED/CCC: COUNTS 8 AND 9/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: FINES AND FEES ARE DEEMED PAID IN FULL/WEAP/DNACOMP/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/NUNCDAT: 03-03-08/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,
